nasb.text: I will lay waste your cities And you will become a desolation. Then you will know that I am the Lord.

esv.text: I will lay your cities waste, and you shall become a desolation, and you shall know that I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 我要使你的城市變為廢墟，你必然荒涼，那時，你就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 我要使你的城邑沦为废墟，一片荒凉，这样你就知道我是耶和华。
